emails.subject: Southern comments
emails.body: Southern comments Rick: I loved, loved, loved your comments about Southern Company. Sue and I decided that you must have been feeling empowered by the success of your carrot comments!!!!

emails.subject: Re: Southern comments
emails.body: Re: Southern comments What was the quote? Rick S. Sent: Mon Oct 22 09:57:11 2001

emails.subject: RE: Southern comments
emails.body: RE: Southern comments something about southern being the most potent of the Neanderthals!! To: Yoho, Lisa

emails.subject: RE: Southern comments
emails.body: Thanks Rick S. To: Yoho, Lisa
